name: Raidraptor - Return
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リターン
desc: If a "Raidraptor" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Target 1 "Raidraptor" monster in your Graveyard; add it to your hand. If a face-up "Raidraptor" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "Raidraptor" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Raidraptor - Return" once per turn.
eff: If a "Raidraptor" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Target 1 "Raidraptor" monster in your Graveyard; add it to your hand. If a face-up "Raidraptor" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "Raidraptor" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Raidraptor - Return" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
